hooks.command: if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qF '- [ ]'; then echo "BLOCK: Do not use checkbox task lists in issues. Use GitHub native sub-issues instead. Run: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-sub-issue.sh <parent> <child>" >&2; exit 1; fi

if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qF 'gh issue create' && printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qF '- [ ]'; then echo "BLOCK: Do not use checkbox task lists in issues. Use GitHub native sub-issues instead. Run: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-sub-issue.sh <parent> <child>" >&2; exit 1; fi

if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'gh issue (create|edit)' && printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(block(ed|s|ing)|sub.?issue|depends on|prerequisite|parent.?issue|#[0-9]{2,})'; then echo "BLOCK: Use native GitHub relationships, not text references. Use: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-blocker.sh or add-sub-issue.sh" >&2; exit 1; fi

if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'gh label create.*block|gh issue edit.*--add-label.*block|--label.*block'; then echo "BLOCK: Do not use 'blocked' labels. Use native GitHub issue dependencies instead. Run: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-blocker.sh <blocked-issue> <blocking-issue>" >&2; exit 1; fi

if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '"blocked"|"blocker"|"blocking"'; then echo "BLOCK: Do not use 'blocked' labels on issues. Use native GitHub issue dependencies instead. Run: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-blocker.sh <blocked-issue> <blocking-issue>" >&2; exit 1; fi

echo "BLOCK: Pre-merge checklist required: (1) CI fully GREEN - run: gh pr checks <PR>. (2) ALL review feedback addressed - check get_review_comments, get_reviews, get_comments. For nits, create follow-up issues then retry." >&2; exit 1

cmd=$(printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'gh pr merge|git merge (main|master|origin)'; then echo "BLOCK: Pre-merge checklist required: (1) CI fully GREEN - gh pr checks <PR>. (2) ALL review feedback addressed. For nits, create follow-up issues then retry." >&2; exit 1; fi
if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh pr create|git push (-u|--set-upstream)'; then printf 'REMINDER: Run /code-review:code-review before creating a PR to ensure code quality.'; fi
printf 'REMINDER: Run /code-review:code-review before creating a PR to ensure code quality.'

printf "REMINDER: After creating/updating issues, ensure you set:
  1. RELATIONSHIPS: sub-issues and blocking
     ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-sub-issue.sh <parent> <child>
     ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-blocker.sh <blocked> <blocker>
  2. PROJECT FIELDS: Priority, Critical Path, Sprint
     Use gh api graphql to set project fields
  3. LABELS: area, type, and priority labels"

if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh issue (create|edit)'; then printf "REMINDER: After creating/updating issues, ensure you set:
  1. RELATIONSHIPS: sub-issues and blocking
     ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-sub-issue.sh <parent> <child>
     ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/add-blocker.sh <blocked> <blocker>
  2. PROJECT FIELDS: Priority, Critical Path, Sprint
     Use gh api graphql to set project fields
  3. LABELS: area, type, and priority labels"; fi
